words.example_zh: 有一位導師可以加速你的職業發展。
words.example2: She mentored three junior employees who all received promotions.
words.example2_zh: 她指導了三位初級員工，他們都獲得了晉升。

words.example: A great user experience keeps customers coming back.
words.example_zh: 出色的用戶體驗讓客戶持續回訪。
words.example2: Improving user experience is the top priority for our mobile app.
words.example2_zh: 改善用戶體驗是我們行動應用的首要任務。

words.example: The tech sector thrived during the bull market.
words.example_zh: 科技板塊在牛市期間蓬勃發展。
words.example2: The current bull market has lasted longer than most analysts expected.
words.example2_zh: 當前牛市持續的時間比大多數分析師預期的要長。

words.example: Debugging the code took longer than expected.
words.example_zh: 程式碼除錯花的時間比預期要長。
words.example2: Proper logging makes debugging much faster and easier.
words.example2_zh: 適當的日誌記錄使除錯更快、更容易。

words.example: Cloud infrastructure reduces the need for physical servers.
words.example_zh: 雲端基礎設施減少了對實體伺服器的需求。
words.example2: The cloud infrastructure scales automatically during peak demand.
words.example2_zh: 雲端基礎設施在需求高峰期自動擴展。

words.example: Resilient employees adapt quickly to change.
words.example_zh: 有韌性的員工能快速適應變化。
words.example2: A resilient team bounces back quickly after setbacks.
words.example2_zh: 有韌性的團隊在挫折後能夠迅速恢復。

words.example: Investors are cautious during a bear market.
words.example_zh: 在熊市期間投資者會保持謹慎。
words.example2: In a bear market, defensive stocks tend to outperform growth stocks.
words.example2_zh: 在熊市中，防禦性股票往往優於成長股。

words.example: End-to-end encryption protects your private messages.
words.example_zh: 端對端加密保護您的私人訊息。
words.example2: All customer data is protected using 256-bit encryption.
words.example2_zh: 所有客戶資料都使用256位元加密保護。

words.example: Take the initiative and suggest solutions to your manager.
words.example_zh: 主動出擊，向你的主管提出解決方案。
words.example2: She showed great initiative by proposing a solution before being asked.
words.example2_zh: 她在被詢問之前就主動提出解決方案，展現了極大的主動性。

words.example: The loan amortization schedule shows monthly payments.
words.example_zh: 貸款攤銷時間表顯示每月還款金額。
words.example2: The software license cost is spread through amortization over five years.
words.example2_zh: 軟體授權費用透過五年攤銷分攤。

words.example: Always submit your work before the deadline.
words.example_zh: 始終在截止日期前提交你的工作。
words.example2: Missing a deadline reflects poorly on your reliability.
words.example2_zh: 錯過截止日期會對你的可靠性產生負面影響。

words.example: Low latency is essential for real-time gaming applications.
words.example_zh: 低延遲對於即時遊戲應用至關重要。
words.example2: High latency is causing complaints from users in remote regions.
words.example2_zh: 高延遲導致偏遠地區的用戶投訴。

words.example: Our performance is measured against industry benchmarks.
words.example_zh: 我們的表現以行業基準來衡量。
words.example2: We regularly benchmark our pricing against competitors.
words.example2_zh: 我們定期將定價與競爭對手進行基準比較。

words.example: Performance bonuses are a great incentive for employees.
words.example_zh: 績效獎金是員工的絕佳激勵。
words.example2: Stock options serve as a long-term incentive for key employees.
words.example2_zh: 股票期權作為關鍵員工的長期激勵。

words.example: Venture capital funds early-stage innovative companies.
words.example_zh: 創投資金資助早期創新公司。
words.example2: Venture capital funding peaked during the technology boom.
words.example2_zh: 創投資金在科技繁榮期間達到頂峰。

words.example: Annual revenue grew by 15% compared to last year.
words.example_zh: 年收益比去年增長了15%。
words.example2: Subscription-based revenue provides more predictable cash flow.
words.example2_zh: 訂閱制收入提供了更可預測的現金流。

words.example: We cannot vote until we have a quorum.
words.example_zh: 在達到法定人數之前我們無法投票。
words.example2: We finally reached a quorum after two members joined online.
words.example2_zh: 兩位成員線上加入後，我們終於達到了法定人數。

words.example: Seamless integration between apps improves user experience.
words.example_zh: 應用程式之間的無縫整合改善了用戶體驗。
words.example2: The API integration allows data to flow between both platforms.
words.example2_zh: API整合使資料能夠在兩個平台之間流動。

words.example: The startup received a valuation of one billion dollars.
words.example_zh: 這家新創公司的估值達到了十億美元。
words.example2: A fair valuation requires both financial data and market comparisons.
words.example2_zh: 公平的估值需要財務資料和市場比較。

words.example: The vote was unanimous in favor of the proposal.
words.example_zh: 投票結果全體一致支持該提案。
words.example2: Board members were unanimous in rejecting the proposal.
words.example2_zh: 董事會成員一致反對該提案。

words.example: All code is stored in the GitHub repository.
words.example_zh: 所有程式碼都儲存在GitHub儲存庫中。
words.example2: Please push your changes to the main repository before 6 PM.
words.example2_zh: 請在下午6點前將您的更改推送到主儲存庫。

words.example: They offered equity as part of the compensation package.
words.example_zh: 他們提供股權作為薪酬方案的一部分。
words.example2: The startup raised capital in exchange for equity.
words.example2_zh: 這家新創公司以股權換取了資金。

words.example: I will send a follow-up email after the meeting.
words.example_zh: 會後我會發送一封跟進郵件。
words.example2: A follow-up call was scheduled for the following Tuesday.
words.example2_zh: 後續通話安排在下週二。

words.example: The CEO delivered the keynote at the conference.
words.example_zh: 執行長在大會發表了主題演講。
words.example2: The CEO gave a powerful keynote on digital transformation.
words.example2_zh: 執行長就數位轉型發表了一場有力的主題演講。

grammar.title: 第一條件句 — 可能發生的情況
grammar.rule: If + 現在式, will/can + 動詞原形。用於討論可能發生的結果。
grammar.pattern: If we [現在式動詞], we will [動詞原形].

examples.en: If we close this deal, we will exceed our quarterly target.
examples.zh: 如果我們完成這筆交易，我們將超過季度目標。

examples.en: If the budget is approved, we can start next month.
examples.zh: 如果預算獲批，我們可以下個月開始。

examples.en: If you have any concerns, please raise them now.
examples.zh: 如果您有任何顧慮，請現在提出。

grammar.wrong: If we will close this deal, we will exceed our target.
grammar.right: If we close this deal, we will exceed our target.
grammar.tip: if 子句用現在式，不用 will（這是最常見的錯誤！）

grammar.title: 表達意見：In my opinion / I believe
grammar.rule: 提出個人看法時使用，讓對方知道這是你的觀點，不是事實。
grammar.pattern: In my opinion, [觀點]. / I believe [that] [觀點].

examples.en: In my opinion, we should prioritize customer satisfaction over cost-cutting.
examples.zh: 在我看來，我們應該把客戶滿意度放在降低成本之上。

examples.en: I believe this partnership will benefit both companies significantly.
examples.zh: 我相信這次合作將對兩家公司都大有裨益。

examples.en: In my view, the timeline is too aggressive.
examples.zh: 在我看來，這個時間表太緊迫了。

grammar.wrong: In my opinion is that we should prioritize customers.
grammar.right: In my opinion, we should prioritize customers.
grammar.tip: In my opinion 後面直接接句子，不加 is that。

grammar.title: 商務常見片語動詞
grammar.rule: 片語動詞 = 動詞 + 介系詞/副詞，整體意思與原動詞不同，必須整組記憶。
grammar.pattern: [動詞] + [介系詞/副詞]

examples.en: Please follow up with the client about the contract status.
examples.zh: 請跟進客戶了解合約狀態。

examples.en: We need to put off the meeting until next week.
examples.zh: 我們需要將會議推遲到下週。

examples.en: Let's go over the proposal before presenting it to the client.
examples.zh: 在向客戶呈報之前，我們先看一遍提案。

grammar.wrong: Please follow the client up about the contract.
grammar.right: Please follow up with the client about the contract.
grammar.tip: follow up with（跟進）/ put off（推遲）/ go over（審閱）/ carry out（執行）/ look into（調查）。

grammar.title: 過去進行式 vs. 簡單過去式
grammar.rule: 過去進行式（was/were + V-ing）強調過去某時正在進行的動作。簡單過去式強調完成的動作。
grammar.pattern: We were [V-ing] when [事件發生] / We [過去式動詞] [時間]

examples.en: We were reviewing the budget when the client called.
examples.zh: 我們正在審查預算時客戶打電話來了。

examples.en: The team was preparing the presentation all morning.
examples.zh: 整個上午團隊都在準備簡報。

examples.en: While I was attending the conference, the deal was finalized.
examples.zh: 當我在參加會議時，交易已經敲定。

grammar.wrong: We reviewed the budget when the client was called.
grammar.right: We were reviewing the budget when the client called.
grammar.tip: 「當...的時候」背景動作用進行式，發生的事件用簡單過去式。

words.example: They offered equity as part of the compensation package.
words.example_zh: 他們提供股權作為薪酬方案的一部分。
words.example2: The startup raised capital in exchange for equity.
words.example2_zh: 這家新創公司以股權換取了資金。

words.example: This marketing campaign had an excellent return on investment.
words.example_zh: 這次行銷活動有出色的投資報酬率。
words.example2: Calculating return on investment helps prioritize spending decisions.
words.example2_zh: 計算投資報酬率有助於確定支出決策的優先順序。

words.example: Integrity is the foundation of a trustworthy business.
words.example_zh: 誠信是值得信賴企業的基礎。
words.example2: Acting with integrity, even when no one is watching, builds real trust.
words.example2_zh: 即使沒人看見，以誠信行事也能建立真正的信任。

words.example: A great user experience keeps customers coming back.
words.example_zh: 出色的用戶體驗讓客戶持續回訪。
words.example2: Improving user experience is the top priority for our mobile app.
words.example2_zh: 改善用戶體驗是我們行動應用的首要任務。

words.example: Venture capital funds early-stage innovative companies.
words.example_zh: 創投資金資助早期創新公司。
words.example2: Venture capital funding peaked during the technology boom.
words.example2_zh: 創投資金在科技繁榮期間達到頂峰。

words.example: All employees must attend the compliance training.
words.example_zh: 所有員工必須參加合規培訓。
words.example2: The new compliance framework applies to all global offices.
words.example2_zh: 新的合規框架適用於所有全球辦事處。

words.example: We hit a major milestone by completing the prototype.
words.example_zh: 完成原型機是我們達到的重要里程碑。
words.example2: Signing the first overseas client was a major milestone for us.
words.example2_zh: 簽下第一個海外客戶是我們的重要里程碑。

words.example: We need a scalable solution for our growing customer base.
words.example_zh: 我們需要一個可擴展的方案來應對不斷增長的客戶群。
words.example2: Investors prefer scalable business models with recurring revenue.
words.example2_zh: 投資者偏好具有定期收入的可規模化商業模式。

words.example: The algorithm recommends products based on your history.
words.example_zh: 演算法根據您的歷史記錄推薦產品。
words.example2: Machine learning algorithms improve with more training data.
words.example2_zh: 機器學習演算法隨著更多訓練資料而改善。

words.example: Rising inflation erodes purchasing power over time.
words.example_zh: 通貨膨脹上升會隨時間侵蝕購買力。
words.example2: Central banks raised interest rates to combat rising inflation.
words.example2_zh: 央行提高利率以應對通貨膨脹上升。

words.example: The company is committed to sustainable business practices.
words.example_zh: 公司致力於可持續的商業實踐。
words.example2: Long-term success requires building a sustainable business model.
words.example2_zh: 長期成功需要建立可持續的商業模式。

words.example: All code is stored in the GitHub repository.
words.example_zh: 所有程式碼都儲存在GitHub儲存庫中。
words.example2: Please push your changes to the main repository before 6 PM.
words.example2_zh: 請在下午6點前將您的更改推送到主儲存庫。

words.example: Teams that collaborate effectively achieve better results.
words.example_zh: 有效合作的團隊能取得更好的成果。
words.example2: Teams that collaborate across departments drive better innovation.
words.example2_zh: 跨部門合作的團隊推動更好的創新。

words.example: The bond yield increased to 4.5% this quarter.
words.example_zh: 本季債券收益率上升至4.5%。
words.example2: Investors moved to high-yield bonds to compensate for higher risk.
words.example2_zh: 投資者轉向高收益債券以補償更高的風險。

words.example: The subsidiary operates independently in the Asian market.
words.example_zh: 該子公司在亞洲市場獨立運營。
words.example2: The Chinese subsidiary will handle all Asia-Pacific operations.
words.example2_zh: 中國子公司將負責所有亞太地區業務。

words.example: We need more bandwidth to support video conferencing.
words.example_zh: 我們需要更多頻寬來支援視訊會議。
words.example2: Heavy video streaming is consuming most of our bandwidth.
words.example2_zh: 大量的視訊串流佔用了我們大部分的頻寬。

words.example: The firewall blocked the unauthorized access attempt.
words.example_zh: 防火牆阻擋了未授權的存取嘗試。
words.example2: The firewall rules were updated to allow traffic from new IPs.
words.example2_zh: 防火牆規則已更新，以允許來自新IP的流量。

words.example: The moderator kept the discussion on track.
words.example_zh: 主持人讓討論保持在正確方向。
words.example2: The moderator skillfully managed the Q&A session.
words.example2_zh: 主持人熟練地掌控了問答環節。

words.example: The fiscal year ends on December 31st.
words.example_zh: 財政年度於12月31日結束。
words.example2: The fiscal year runs from April to March in Japan.
words.example2_zh: 日本的財政年度從4月到3月。

words.example: High employee turnover increases recruitment costs.
words.example_zh: 高員工流動率增加了招募成本。
words.example2: High turnover in sales roles is costly and disrupts client relationships.
words.example2_zh: 銷售職位的高人員流動率成本高昂，且會破壞客戶關係。

words.example: Please list all deliverables in the project plan.
words.example_zh: 請在專案計畫中列出所有交付成果。
words.example2: All deliverables must be reviewed by the project manager first.
words.example2_zh: 所有交付成果必須先由專案經理審查。

words.example: Being proactive helps you solve problems before they arise.
words.example_zh: 積極主動幫助你在問題發生前解決它。
words.example2: Being proactive means anticipating problems before they occur.
words.example2_zh: 積極主動意味著在問題發生之前預見它們。

words.example: We need to streamline the approval process.
words.example_zh: 我們需要簡化審批流程。
words.example2: We streamlined the hiring process from six steps to three.
words.example2_zh: 我們將招募流程從六個步驟簡化為三個步驟。

words.example: The meeting was adjourned until next Monday.
words.example_zh: 會議休會至下週一。
words.example2: The chairperson proposed to adjourn until further notice.
words.example2_zh: 主席提議休會，待進一步通知再開。

words.example: Server virtualization reduces hardware costs significantly.
words.example_zh: 伺服器虛擬化大幅降低了硬體成本。
words.example2: Server virtualization allows one physical machine to run multiple systems.
words.example2_zh: 伺服器虛擬化允許一台實體機器運行多個系統。

words.example: They launched a joint venture with a European partner.
words.example_zh: 他們與一家歐洲合作夥伴成立了合資企業。
words.example2: The venture proved profitable within 18 months of launch.
words.example2_zh: 這項合資企業在啟動後18個月內就實現了盈利。

words.example: Seamless integration between apps improves user experience.
words.example_zh: 應用程式之間的無縫整合改善了用戶體驗。
words.example2: The API integration allows data to flow between both platforms.
words.example2_zh: API整合使資料能夠在兩個平台之間流動。

words.example: Many companies outsource IT support to reduce costs.
words.example_zh: 許多公司將IT支援外包以降低成本。
words.example2: We plan to outsource logistics to reduce operational costs.
words.example2_zh: 我們計劃外包物流以降低營運成本。

words.example: Blockchain technology ensures transparent and secure transactions.
words.example_zh: 區塊鏈技術確保交易透明且安全。
words.example2: The supply chain team is exploring blockchain for better traceability.
words.example2_zh: 供應鏈團隊正在探索區塊鏈以提升可追溯性。

words.example: Always submit your work before the deadline.
words.example_zh: 始終在截止日期前提交你的工作。
words.example2: Missing a deadline reflects poorly on your reliability.
words.example2_zh: 錯過截止日期會對你的可靠性產生負面影響。

grammar.title: 第三條件句 — 假設過去不同的結果
grammar.rule: If + had + 過去分詞, would have + 過去分詞。討論過去「如果當時不同」的假設結果。
grammar.pattern: If we had [過去分詞], we would have [過去分詞].

examples.en: If we had invested earlier, we would have made a larger profit.
examples.zh: 如果我們早點投資，就會獲得更大的利潤。

examples.en: If they had checked the data, they would have found the error.
examples.zh: 如果他們核查了資料，就會發現錯誤。

examples.en: If I had known about the meeting, I would have attended.
examples.zh: 如果我知道有這個會議，我就會參加了。

grammar.wrong: If we invested earlier, we would make larger profit.
grammar.right: If we had invested earlier, we would have made a larger profit.
grammar.tip: 第三條件：if 子句用 had+過去分詞，主句用 would have+過去分詞。

grammar.title: 提出建議：I suggest / I recommend
grammar.rule: 正式提出建議的句型。suggest/recommend 後面接 V-ing 或 that 子句。
grammar.pattern: I suggest [V-ing] / I recommend [V-ing] / I suggest that we [動詞原形]

examples.en: I suggest scheduling a follow-up meeting next week.
examples.zh: 我建議安排下週的後續會議。

examples.en: I recommend reviewing the contract before signing.
examples.zh: 我建議在簽署前審查合約。

examples.en: I suggest that we postpone the launch until Q2.
examples.zh: 我建議我們將發布推遲到第二季。

grammar.wrong: I suggest to schedule a follow-up meeting.
grammar.right: I suggest scheduling a follow-up meeting.
grammar.tip: suggest 後面接 V-ing，不接 to V！（recommend 也一樣）

grammar.title: Make vs. Do — 常見搭配
grammar.rule: make 常用於創造/產生；do 常用於執行/進行。固定搭配需整組記憶。
grammar.pattern: make [decision/profit/mistake] / do [business/research/work]

examples.en: We need to make a decision before the end of the quarter.
examples.zh: 我們需要在季度結束前做出決定。

examples.en: The team did extensive research before launching the product.
examples.zh: 團隊在產品上市前做了大量研究。

examples.en: The company made significant progress in reducing emissions.
examples.zh: 公司在減少排放方面取得了顯著進展。

grammar.wrong: We need to do a decision.
grammar.right: We need to make a decision.
grammar.tip: make：decision, profit, mistake, progress, effort, offer。do：business, research, damage, work, a favor。

grammar.title: 表示原因：Because / Due to
grammar.rule: Because 後接完整子句；due to 後接名詞或名詞片語。
grammar.pattern: Because [子句] / Due to [名詞片語]

examples.en: We postponed the launch because the product needed more testing.
examples.zh: 我們推遲了發布，因為產品需要更多測試。

examples.en: Due to budget constraints, we cannot proceed with the original plan.
examples.zh: 由於預算限制，我們無法繼續原計畫。

examples.en: Sales declined because of the global economic slowdown.
examples.zh: 由於全球經濟放緩，銷售額下降。

grammar.wrong: Due to we don't have enough budget, we cannot proceed.
grammar.right: Due to budget constraints, we cannot proceed.
grammar.tip: due to 後面接名詞，不接子句！要接子句就用 because。

words.example: The CEO delivered the keynote at the conference.
words.example_zh: 執行長在大會發表了主題演講。
words.example2: The CEO gave a powerful keynote on digital transformation.
words.example2_zh: 執行長就數位轉型發表了一場有力的主題演講。

words.example: All code is stored in the GitHub repository.
words.example_zh: 所有程式碼都儲存在GitHub儲存庫中。
words.example2: Please push your changes to the main repository before 6 PM.
words.example2_zh: 請在下午6點前將您的更改推送到主儲存庫。

words.example: Please escalate this issue to your manager immediately.
words.example_zh: 請立即將此問題呈報給你的主管。
words.example2: Please escalate this billing dispute to the finance team.
words.example2_zh: 請將這筆帳單爭議呈報給財務團隊。

words.example: Search engine optimization improves your website ranking.
words.example_zh: 搜尋引擎優化提升您的網站排名。
words.example2: Database optimization reduced our page load time by 40%.
words.example2_zh: 資料庫優化將我們的頁面載入時間縮短了40%。

words.example: The balance sheet shows the company's financial position.
words.example_zh: 資產負債表顯示公司的財務狀況。
words.example2: A strong balance sheet gives companies the flexibility to weather downturns.
words.example2_zh: 強健的資產負債表使公司在經濟下滑時有靈活應對的空間。

words.example: This marketing campaign had an excellent return on investment.
words.example_zh: 這次行銷活動有出色的投資報酬率。
words.example2: Calculating return on investment helps prioritize spending decisions.
words.example2_zh: 計算投資報酬率有助於確定支出決策的優先順序。

words.example: The fiscal year ends on December 31st.
words.example_zh: 財政年度於12月31日結束。
words.example2: The fiscal year runs from April to March in Japan.
words.example2_zh: 日本的財政年度從4月到3月。

words.example: Portfolio diversification reduces investment risk.
words.example_zh: 投資組合多元化可降低投資風險。
words.example2: Geographic diversification protects the portfolio from local downturns.
words.example2_zh: 地域多元化可保護投資組合免受當地經濟下滑的影響。

words.example: The startup received a valuation of one billion dollars.
words.example_zh: 這家新創公司的估值達到了十億美元。
words.example2: A fair valuation requires both financial data and market comparisons.
words.example2_zh: 公平的估值需要財務資料和市場比較。

words.example: Having a mentor can accelerate your career growth.
words.example_zh: 有一位導師可以加速你的職業發展。
words.example2: She mentored three junior employees who all received promotions.
words.example2_zh: 她指導了三位初級員工，他們都獲得了晉升。

words.example: Let's brainstorm ideas for the new product launch.
words.example_zh: 我們來腦力激盪新產品上市的點子。
words.example2: Let's brainstorm ways to improve the onboarding process.
words.example2_zh: 我們來集思廣益，改善新員工入職流程。

words.example: We need more bandwidth to support video conferencing.
words.example_zh: 我們需要更多頻寬來支援視訊會議。
words.example2: Heavy video streaming is consuming most of our bandwidth.
words.example2_zh: 大量的視訊串流佔用了我們大部分的頻寬。

words.example: Positive cash flow is vital for business survival.
words.example_zh: 正向現金流對企業生存至關重要。
words.example2: Startups often fail due to poor cash flow management, not lack of profit.
words.example2_zh: 新創公司失敗通常是因為現金流管理不善，而非缺乏利潤。

words.example: Networking events are great for meeting industry peers.
words.example_zh: 社交活動非常適合結識行業同仁。
words.example2: Networking online can be as effective as meeting people in person.
words.example2_zh: 線上建立人脈可以和面對面認識人一樣有效。

words.example: Hedge funds often use complex strategies to generate returns.
words.example_zh: 對沖基金常使用複雜策略來產生回報。
words.example2: The hedge fund posted a 30% return even during the market downturn.
words.example2_zh: 即使在市場低迷期間，對沖基金也錄得30%的回報。

words.example: Who will take the minutes during today's meeting?
words.example_zh: 今天的會議記錄由誰負責？
words.example2: The minutes confirmed that the budget proposal was approved.
words.example2_zh: 會議記錄確認預算提案已獲批准。

words.example: Cloud infrastructure reduces the need for physical servers.
words.example_zh: 雲端基礎設施減少了對實體伺服器的需求。
words.example2: The cloud infrastructure scales automatically during peak demand.
words.example2_zh: 雲端基礎設施在需求高峰期自動擴展。

words.example: Many companies outsource IT support to reduce costs.
words.example_zh: 許多公司將IT支援外包以降低成本。
words.example2: We plan to outsource logistics to reduce operational costs.
words.example2_zh: 我們計劃外包物流以降低營運成本。

words.example: The key takeaway from today's meeting is to focus on quality.
words.example_zh: 今天會議的重點結論是專注於品質。
words.example2: The key takeaway from the workshop was the importance of data.
words.example2_zh: 工作坊的主要收穫是資料的重要性。

words.example: An external auditor conducts the annual financial audit.
words.example_zh: 外部審計師進行年度財務審計。
words.example2: The annual audit revealed no material discrepancies in the accounts.
words.example2_zh: 年度審計未發現帳目中有任何重大差異。

words.example: Accountability means taking responsibility for your actions.
words.example_zh: 問責意味著為自己的行動承擔責任。
words.example2: A culture of accountability starts at the leadership level.
words.example2_zh: 問責文化從領導層開始。

words.example: The loan amortization schedule shows monthly payments.
words.example_zh: 貸款攤銷時間表顯示每月還款金額。
words.example2: The software license cost is spread through amortization over five years.
words.example2_zh: 軟體授權費用透過五年攤銷分攤。

words.example: They launched a joint venture with a European partner.
words.example_zh: 他們與一家歐洲合作夥伴成立了合資企業。
words.example2: The venture proved profitable within 18 months of launch.
words.example2_zh: 這項合資企業在啟動後18個月內就實現了盈利。

words.example: We will negotiate the contract terms next week.
words.example_zh: 我們下週將協商合約條款。
words.example2: Our goal is to negotiate better payment terms with the vendor.
words.example2_zh: 我們的目標是與供應商談判更好的付款條件。

words.example: Machine learning enables computers to learn from data.
words.example_zh: 機器學習使電腦能夠從資料中學習。
words.example2: Machine learning is being used to detect fraudulent transactions.
words.example2_zh: 機器學習被用來偵測詐欺性交易。

words.example: The procurement team negotiated better prices with suppliers.
words.example_zh: 採購團隊與供應商談判了更好的價格。
words.example2: The procurement department is evaluating three new suppliers.
words.example2_zh: 採購部門正在評估三家新供應商。

words.example: A balanced portfolio includes stocks, bonds, and real estate.
words.example_zh: 均衡的投資組合包括股票、債券和房地產。
words.example2: Rebalancing your portfolio quarterly helps maintain your target allocation.
words.example2_zh: 每季重新平衡投資組合有助於維持目標配置。

words.example: All employees must attend the compliance training.
words.example_zh: 所有員工必須參加合規培訓。
words.example2: The new compliance framework applies to all global offices.
words.example2_zh: 新的合規框架適用於所有全球辦事處。

words.example: The firewall blocked the unauthorized access attempt.
words.example_zh: 防火牆阻擋了未授權的存取嘗試。
words.example2: The firewall rules were updated to allow traffic from new IPs.
words.example2_zh: 防火牆規則已更新，以允許來自新IP的流量。

words.example: Effective professionals know how to multitask efficiently.
words.example_zh: 高效的專業人士知道如何高效地同時處理多項工作。
words.example2: Though common, trying to multitask often reduces overall quality.
words.example2_zh: 雖然很普遍，但嘗試同時處理多項工作往往會降低整體質量。

grammar.title: 問接問句 — 禮貌問法
grammar.rule: 直接問句在商務場合可能太唐突，改用間接問句更有禮貌。
grammar.pattern: Could you tell me [what/when/how] + [直敘句語序]?

examples.en: Could you tell me when the report will be ready?
examples.zh: 您能告訴我報告什麼時候會準備好嗎？

examples.en: Do you know how many people will attend the conference?
examples.zh: 您知道有多少人會參加會議嗎？

examples.en: I was wondering if you have reviewed the proposal yet.
examples.zh: 我想知道您是否已經審查過提案了。

grammar.wrong: Could you tell me when will the report be ready?
grammar.right: Could you tell me when the report will be ready?
grammar.tip: 間接問句用直敘句語序（主詞在前），不用疑問句語序（助動詞不提前）。

grammar.title: 表示對比：However / Although
grammar.rule: However 放句首加逗號；Although 放在子句前面。表示轉折或對比。
grammar.pattern: However, [句子]. / Although [子句], [主句].

examples.en: The project is on schedule. However, the budget is running low.
examples.zh: 專案進展順利。然而，預算正在減少。

examples.en: Although the market is challenging, we remain optimistic.
examples.zh: 雖然市場充滿挑戰，我們仍然保持樂觀。

examples.en: The results are promising. However, we need more data.
examples.zh: 結果很有希望。然而，我們需要更多數據。

grammar.wrong: However the project is on schedule, the budget is low.
grammar.right: The project is on schedule. However, the budget is running low.
grammar.tip: However 是副詞，後面加逗號，不能像 although 一樣連接兩個子句。

grammar.title: in / on / at — 時間介系詞
grammar.rule: at 用於具體時刻；on 用於日期和星期；in 用於月份、年份、時段。
grammar.pattern: at [時刻] / on [日期/星期] / in [月/年/時段]

examples.en: The meeting starts at 9 AM on Monday.
examples.zh: 會議在週一上午9點開始。

examples.en: We will launch the product in Q3.
examples.zh: 我們將在第三季推出產品。

examples.en: The report is due on Friday, March 15th.
examples.zh: 報告的截止日期是3月15日（週五）。

grammar.wrong: The meeting starts in Monday at morning.
grammar.right: The meeting starts at 9 AM on Monday.
grammar.tip: at + 時刻、on + 日期/星期、in + 月份/季度/年份，不要混用。

grammar.title: 表示對比：On the other hand / In contrast
grammar.rule: 提出不同觀點或相反情況。in contrast 強調差異；on the other hand 提出另一方觀點。
grammar.pattern: On the other hand, [句子]. / In contrast, [句子].

examples.en: The first option is cheaper. On the other hand, it takes longer to implement.
examples.zh: 第一個選項更便宜。另一方面，實施起來需要更長時間。

examples.en: Our revenue increased by 20%. In contrast, our main competitor saw a decline.
examples.zh: 我們的收入增長了20%。相比之下，主要競爭對手出現了下滑。

examples.en: The new system is more complex. On the other hand, it offers more features.
examples.zh: 新系統更複雜。另一方面，它提供了更多功能。

grammar.wrong: On the other hand the option is cheaper.
grammar.right: The first option is cheaper. On the other hand, it takes longer.
grammar.tip: On the other hand / In contrast 句首加逗號。

words.example: All code is stored in the GitHub repository.
words.example_zh: 所有程式碼都儲存在GitHub儲存庫中。
words.example2: Please push your changes to the main repository before 6 PM.
words.example2_zh: 請在下午6點前將您的更改推送到主儲存庫。

words.example: The startup received a valuation of one billion dollars.
words.example_zh: 這家新創公司的估值達到了十億美元。
words.example2: A fair valuation requires both financial data and market comparisons.
words.example2_zh: 公平的估值需要財務資料和市場比較。

words.example: The CEO delivered the keynote at the conference.
words.example_zh: 執行長在大會發表了主題演講。
words.example2: The CEO gave a powerful keynote on digital transformation.
words.example2_zh: 執行長就數位轉型發表了一場有力的主題演講。

words.example: Government securities are considered low-risk investments.
words.example_zh: 政府有價證券被視為低風險投資。
words.example2: Mortgage-backed securities played a key role in the 2008 financial crisis.
words.example2_zh: 抵押貸款支持的有價證券在2008年金融危機中發揮了關鍵作用。

words.example: The subsidiary operates independently in the Asian market.
words.example_zh: 該子公司在亞洲市場獨立運營。
words.example2: The Chinese subsidiary will handle all Asia-Pacific operations.
words.example2_zh: 中國子公司將負責所有亞太地區業務。

words.example: Let's brainstorm ideas for the new product launch.
words.example_zh: 我們來腦力激盪新產品上市的點子。
words.example2: Let's brainstorm ways to improve the onboarding process.
words.example2_zh: 我們來集思廣益，改善新員工入職流程。

words.example: Positive cash flow is vital for business survival.
words.example_zh: 正向現金流對企業生存至關重要。
words.example2: Startups often fail due to poor cash flow management, not lack of profit.
words.example2_zh: 新創公司失敗通常是因為現金流管理不善，而非缺乏利潤。

words.example: An external auditor conducts the annual financial audit.
words.example_zh: 外部審計師進行年度財務審計。
words.example2: The annual audit revealed no material discrepancies in the accounts.
words.example2_zh: 年度審計未發現帳目中有任何重大差異。

words.example: High liquidity means assets can be quickly converted to cash.
words.example_zh: 高流動性意味著資產可以快速轉換為現金。
words.example2: During the crisis, even well-performing assets faced liquidity problems.
words.example2_zh: 危機期間，即使表現良好的資產也面臨流動性問題。

words.example: A good manager knows how to delegate tasks effectively.
words.example_zh: 好的管理者知道如何有效授權。
words.example2: She learned to delegate work so she could focus on strategy.
words.example2_zh: 她學會了授權，以便集中精力在策略上。

words.example: Effective professionals know how to multitask efficiently.
words.example_zh: 高效的專業人士知道如何高效地同時處理多項工作。
words.example2: Though common, trying to multitask often reduces overall quality.
words.example2_zh: 雖然很普遍，但嘗試同時處理多項工作往往會降低整體質量。

words.example: The procurement team negotiated better prices with suppliers.
words.example_zh: 採購團隊與供應商談判了更好的價格。
words.example2: The procurement department is evaluating three new suppliers.
words.example2_zh: 採購部門正在評估三家新供應商。

words.example: The board will convene an emergency meeting tomorrow.
words.example_zh: 董事會明天將召開緊急會議。
words.example2: The emergency task force will convene first thing tomorrow.
words.example2_zh: 緊急任務小組明天一早將召開會議。

words.example: Networking events are great for meeting industry peers.
words.example_zh: 社交活動非常適合結識行業同仁。
words.example2: Networking online can be as effective as meeting people in person.
words.example2_zh: 線上建立人脈可以和面對面認識人一樣有效。

words.example: Each iteration of the product improves based on feedback.
words.example_zh: 產品的每次迭代都根據回饋進行改進。
words.example2: We are on the fifth iteration and the product is much improved.
words.example2_zh: 我們已進行第五次迭代，產品改善了很多。

words.example: Automation has transformed manufacturing processes worldwide.
words.example_zh: 自動化改變了全球的製造流程。
words.example2: Process automation reduced manual errors by over 60%.
words.example2_zh: 流程自動化將手動錯誤減少了60%以上。

words.example: Resilient employees adapt quickly to change.
words.example_zh: 有韌性的員工能快速適應變化。
words.example2: A resilient team bounces back quickly after setbacks.
words.example2_zh: 有韌性的團隊在挫折後能夠迅速恢復。

words.example: The tech sector thrived during the bull market.
words.example_zh: 科技板塊在牛市期間蓬勃發展。
words.example2: The current bull market has lasted longer than most analysts expected.
words.example2_zh: 當前牛市持續的時間比大多數分析師預期的要長。

words.example: We built a prototype to test the concept with users.
words.example_zh: 我們建立了原型來與用戶測試概念。
words.example2: The engineering team built three prototypes before settling on a design.
words.example2_zh: 工程團隊在確定設計前製作了三個原型。

words.example: Each action item must have an owner and a deadline.
words.example_zh: 每個待辦事項都必須有負責人和截止日期。
words.example2: The action items were documented and shared after the meeting.
words.example2_zh: 會後待辦事項已記錄並分享給所有人。

words.example: Equipment depreciation reduces taxable income.
words.example_zh: 設備折舊可減少應稅收入。
words.example2: Machinery depreciation is recorded as an expense each year.
words.example2_zh: 機械折舊每年記錄為一項費用。

words.example: The company is committed to sustainable business practices.
words.example_zh: 公司致力於可持續的商業實踐。
words.example2: Long-term success requires building a sustainable business model.
words.example2_zh: 長期成功需要建立可持續的商業模式。

words.example: Being assertive helps you communicate your needs clearly.
words.example_zh: 果斷有助於你清楚地溝通自己的需求。
words.example2: Be assertive when negotiating; know what you want and ask for it.
words.example2_zh: 談判時要果斷；清楚自己想要什麼並直接提出。

words.example: Rising inflation erodes purchasing power over time.
words.example_zh: 通貨膨脹上升會隨時間侵蝕購買力。
words.example2: Central banks raised interest rates to combat rising inflation.
words.example2_zh: 央行提高利率以應對通貨膨脹上升。

words.example: The board passed a resolution to expand overseas.
words.example_zh: 董事會通過了海外擴張的決議。
words.example2: The resolution was adopted with a majority vote.
words.example2_zh: 該決議以多數票通過。

words.example: The pandemic disrupted global supply chains significantly.
words.example_zh: 疫情嚴重擾亂了全球供應鏈。
words.example2: Companies are reshoring supply chains to reduce geopolitical risk.
words.example2_zh: 企業正在將供應鏈遷回本國以降低地緣政治風險。

words.zh: 敏捷的；靈活的（開發方法）
words.example: The team uses agile methodology for software development.
words.example_zh: 團隊使用敏捷方法論進行軟體開發。
words.example2: Adopting agile practices helped the team ship features faster.
words.example2_zh: 採用敏捷實踐幫助團隊更快地發布功能。

words.example: They offered equity as part of the compensation package.
words.example_zh: 他們提供股權作為薪酬方案的一部分。
words.example2: The startup raised capital in exchange for equity.
words.example2_zh: 這家新創公司以股權換取了資金。

words.example: They expanded their business through a franchise model.
words.example_zh: 他們透過加盟模式擴展業務。
words.example2: She bought a franchise and opened three locations in two years.
words.example2_zh: 她購買了加盟權，兩年內開了三家分店。

words.example: This marketing campaign had an excellent return on investment.
words.example_zh: 這次行銷活動有出色的投資報酬率。
words.example2: Calculating return on investment helps prioritize spending decisions.
words.example2_zh: 計算投資報酬率有助於確定支出決策的優先順序。

grammar.title: 第一條件句 — 可能發生的情況
grammar.rule: If + 現在式, will/can + 動詞原形。用於討論可能發生的結果。
grammar.pattern: If we [現在式動詞], we will [動詞原形].

examples.en: If we close this deal, we will exceed our quarterly target.
examples.zh: 如果我們完成這筆交易，我們將超過季度目標。

examples.en: If the budget is approved, we can start next month.
examples.zh: 如果預算獲批，我們可以下個月開始。

examples.en: If you have any concerns, please raise them now.
examples.zh: 如果您有任何顧慮，請現在提出。

grammar.wrong: If we will close this deal, we will exceed our target.
grammar.right: If we close this deal, we will exceed our target.
grammar.tip: if 子句用現在式，不用 will（這是最常見的錯誤！）

grammar.title: 表示補充：In addition / Furthermore
grammar.rule: 表示「另外、此外」，用來補充前面說的內容，使論點更強。
grammar.pattern: In addition, [補充內容]. / Furthermore, [更進一步的內容].

examples.en: The new system reduces costs. In addition, it improves efficiency.
examples.zh: 新系統降低了成本。此外，它還提高了效率。

examples.en: We need to improve quality. Furthermore, we must reduce delivery time.
examples.zh: 我們需要提高品質。而且，我們還必須縮短交貨時間。

examples.en: The candidate has relevant experience. In addition, she speaks three languages.
examples.zh: 該候選人有相關經驗。此外，她會說三種語言。

grammar.wrong: In addition we need to improve quality.
grammar.right: In addition, we need to improve quality.
grammar.tip: In addition 和 Furthermore 後面一定要加逗號。

grammar.title: 請求澄清：Could you clarify...
grammar.rule: 聽不懂或需要更多說明時，禮貌請求對方澄清的句型。
grammar.pattern: Could you clarify [what/how/why]...? / Could you elaborate on...?

examples.en: Could you clarify what you mean by 'revised timeline'?
examples.zh: 您能澄清「修訂後的時間表」是什麼意思嗎？

examples.en: Could you elaborate on the proposed budget allocation?
examples.zh: 您能詳細說明提議的預算分配嗎？

examples.en: I'm not quite sure I understand. Could you give an example?
examples.zh: 我不太確定我理解了。您能舉個例子嗎？

grammar.wrong: What you mean?
grammar.right: Could you clarify what you mean?
grammar.tip: 直接問 'What you mean?' 不夠禮貌，加 Could you 讓語氣更委婉。

grammar.title: 第三條件句 — 假設過去不同的結果
grammar.rule: If + had + 過去分詞, would have + 過去分詞。討論過去「如果當時不同」的假設結果。
grammar.pattern: If we had [過去分詞], we would have [過去分詞].

examples.en: If we had invested earlier, we would have made a larger profit.
examples.zh: 如果我們早點投資，就會獲得更大的利潤。

examples.en: If they had checked the data, they would have found the error.
examples.zh: 如果他們核查了資料，就會發現錯誤。

examples.en: If I had known about the meeting, I would have attended.
examples.zh: 如果我知道有這個會議，我就會參加了。

grammar.wrong: If we invested earlier, we would make larger profit.
grammar.right: If we had invested earlier, we would have made a larger profit.
grammar.tip: 第三條件：if 子句用 had+過去分詞，主句用 would have+過去分詞。

words.example: Rising inflation erodes purchasing power over time.
words.example_zh: 通貨膨脹上升會隨時間侵蝕購買力。
words.example2: Central banks raised interest rates to combat rising inflation.
words.example2_zh: 央行提高利率以應對通貨膨脹上升。

words.example: A good manager knows how to delegate tasks effectively.
words.example_zh: 好的管理者知道如何有效授權。
words.example2: She learned to delegate work so she could focus on strategy.
words.example2_zh: 她學會了授權，以便集中精力在策略上。

words.example: Seamless integration between apps improves user experience.
words.example_zh: 應用程式之間的無縫整合改善了用戶體驗。
words.example2: The API integration allows data to flow between both platforms.
words.example2_zh: API整合使資料能夠在兩個平台之間流動。

words.example: The fiscal year ends on December 31st.
words.example_zh: 財政年度於12月31日結束。
words.example2: The fiscal year runs from April to March in Japan.
words.example2_zh: 日本的財政年度從4月到3月。

words.example: The meeting was adjourned until next Monday.
words.example_zh: 會議休會至下週一。
words.example2: The chairperson proposed to adjourn until further notice.
words.example2_zh: 主席提議休會，待進一步通知再開。

words.example: The firewall blocked the unauthorized access attempt.
words.example_zh: 防火牆阻擋了未授權的存取嘗試。
words.example2: The firewall rules were updated to allow traffic from new IPs.
words.example2_zh: 防火牆規則已更新，以允許來自新IP的流量。

words.example: Reducing overhead costs is essential for profitability.
words.example_zh: 降低管銷費用對盈利能力至關重要。
words.example2: Automating routine tasks helped cut overhead by 25%.
words.example2_zh: 自動化例行任務幫助降低了25%的管銷費用。

words.example: We need more bandwidth to support video conferencing.
words.example_zh: 我們需要更多頻寬來支援視訊會議。
words.example2: Heavy video streaming is consuming most of our bandwidth.
words.example2_zh: 大量的視訊串流佔用了我們大部分的頻寬。

words.example: Performance bonuses are a great incentive for employees.
words.example_zh: 績效獎金是員工的絕佳激勵。
words.example2: Stock options serve as a long-term incentive for key employees.
words.example2_zh: 股票期權作為關鍵員工的長期激勵。

words.example: Annual revenue grew by 15% compared to last year.
words.example_zh: 年收益比去年增長了15%。
words.example2: Subscription-based revenue provides more predictable cash flow.
words.example2_zh: 訂閱制收入提供了更可預測的現金流。

words.example: Being assertive helps you communicate your needs clearly.
words.example_zh: 果斷有助於你清楚地溝通自己的需求。
words.example2: Be assertive when negotiating; know what you want and ask for it.
words.example2_zh: 談判時要果斷；清楚自己想要什麼並直接提出。

words.example: The deployment of the new system was completed overnight.
words.example_zh: 新系統的部署在一夜之間完成。
words.example2: Automated deployment pipelines reduce human error significantly.
words.example2_zh: 自動化部署流程大幅減少了人為錯誤。

words.example: Each iteration of the product improves based on feedback.
words.example_zh: 產品的每次迭代都根據回饋進行改進。
words.example2: We are on the fifth iteration and the product is much improved.
words.example2_zh: 我們已進行第五次迭代，產品改善了很多。

words.example: End-to-end encryption protects your private messages.
words.example_zh: 端對端加密保護您的私人訊息。
words.example2: All customer data is protected using 256-bit encryption.
words.example2_zh: 所有客戶資料都使用256位元加密保護。

words.example: High employee turnover increases recruitment costs.
words.example_zh: 高員工流動率增加了招募成本。
words.example2: High turnover in sales roles is costly and disrupts client relationships.
words.example2_zh: 銷售職位的高人員流動率成本高昂，且會破壞客戶關係。

words.example: All stakeholders must approve the project before launch.
words.example_zh: 所有利害關係人必須在啟動前批准該專案。
words.example2: Stakeholder feedback shaped the final design of the product.
words.example2_zh: 利害關係人的回饋影響了產品的最終設計。

words.example: Automation has transformed manufacturing processes worldwide.
words.example_zh: 自動化改變了全球的製造流程。
words.example2: Process automation reduced manual errors by over 60%.
words.example2_zh: 流程自動化將手動錯誤減少了60%以上。

words.example: Server virtualization reduces hardware costs significantly.
words.example_zh: 伺服器虛擬化大幅降低了硬體成本。
words.example2: Server virtualization allows one physical machine to run multiple systems.
words.example2_zh: 伺服器虛擬化允許一台實體機器運行多個系統。

words.example: Having a mentor can accelerate your career growth.
words.example_zh: 有一位導師可以加速你的職業發展。
words.example2: She mentored three junior employees who all received promotions.
words.example2_zh: 她指導了三位初級員工，他們都獲得了晉升。

words.example: Effective professionals know how to multitask efficiently.
words.example_zh: 高效的專業人士知道如何高效地同時處理多項工作。
words.example2: Though common, trying to multitask often reduces overall quality.
words.example2_zh: 雖然很普遍，但嘗試同時處理多項工作往往會降低整體質量。

words.example: Please list all deliverables in the project plan.
words.example_zh: 請在專案計畫中列出所有交付成果。
words.example2: All deliverables must be reviewed by the project manager first.
words.example2_zh: 所有交付成果必須先由專案經理審查。

words.example: They expanded their business through a franchise model.
words.example_zh: 他們透過加盟模式擴展業務。
words.example2: She bought a franchise and opened three locations in two years.
words.example2_zh: 她購買了加盟權，兩年內開了三家分店。

words.example: The company is committed to sustainable business practices.
words.example_zh: 公司致力於可持續的商業實踐。
words.example2: Long-term success requires building a sustainable business model.
words.example2_zh: 長期成功需要建立可持續的商業模式。

words.example: Adaptable employees are valuable in a changing environment.
words.example_zh: 適應力強的員工在變化的環境中非常寶貴。
words.example2: The most adaptable employees are often the most valuable.
words.example2_zh: 適應性最強的員工往往是最有價值的。

words.example: Empathy is a key skill for effective leadership.
words.example_zh: 同理心是有效領導的關鍵技能。
words.example2: Managers who show empathy build stronger, more loyal teams.
words.example2_zh: 展現同理心的管理者建立更強大、更忠誠的團隊。

words.example: Resilient employees adapt quickly to change.
words.example_zh: 有韌性的員工能快速適應變化。
words.example2: A resilient team bounces back quickly after setbacks.
words.example2_zh: 有韌性的團隊在挫折後能夠迅速恢復。

words.example: Investing in cybersecurity is critical for every business.
words.example_zh: 投資網路安全對每個企業都至關重要。
words.example2: Cybersecurity threats are becoming more sophisticated each year.
words.example2_zh: 每年網路安全威脅變得越來越複雜。

words.example: Networking events are great for meeting industry peers.
words.example_zh: 社交活動非常適合結識行業同仁。
words.example2: Networking online can be as effective as meeting people in person.
words.example2_zh: 線上建立人脈可以和面對面認識人一樣有效。

words.example: Let's brainstorm ideas for the new product launch.
words.example_zh: 我們來腦力激盪新產品上市的點子。
words.example2: Let's brainstorm ways to improve the onboarding process.
words.example2_zh: 我們來集思廣益，改善新員工入職流程。

words.example: The balance sheet shows the company's financial position.
words.example_zh: 資產負債表顯示公司的財務狀況。
words.example2: A strong balance sheet gives companies the flexibility to weather downturns.
words.example2_zh: 強健的資產負債表使公司在經濟下滑時有靈活應對的空間。

grammar.title: 被動語態的商務用法
grammar.rule: 當執行者不重要或不知道，或強調被影響的對象時，用被動語態。商業公文很常見。
grammar.pattern: [主詞] + is/was/will be + [過去分詞]

examples.en: All employees are required to complete the training by Friday.
examples.zh: 所有員工必須在週五前完成培訓。

examples.en: The decision was made after careful consideration.
examples.zh: 這個決定是經過深思熟慮後做出的。

examples.en: The new policy will be implemented starting next quarter.
examples.zh: 新政策將從下季度開始實施。

grammar.wrong: Someone requires all employees to complete training.
grammar.right: All employees are required to complete the training.
grammar.tip: 商業報告、通知、政策說明常用被動語態，因為重點是事情本身，不是誰做的。

grammar.title: Should — 建議與責任
grammar.rule: 表示應該做某事（建議、義務）。比 must 柔和，比 could 更明確。
grammar.pattern: We should [動詞原形] / You should consider [V-ing]

examples.en: We should review the budget before the Q3 planning.
examples.zh: 我們應該在Q3規劃前審查預算。

examples.en: You should consider the risks before making a decision.
examples.zh: 您應該在做決定前考慮風險。

examples.en: This issue should be escalated to management.
examples.zh: 這個問題應該呈報給管理層。

grammar.wrong: We should to review the budget.
grammar.right: We should review the budget.
grammar.tip: 情態動詞後面直接接動詞原形，不加 to。

grammar.title: Could — 委婉請求與可能性
grammar.rule: 比 can 更禮貌；用於請求、建議、可能性。商務場合常用。
grammar.pattern: Could you [動詞原形]... ?  /  We could [動詞原形]...

examples.en: Could you send me the report by Friday?
examples.zh: 您能在週五前把報告發給我嗎？

examples.en: We could schedule a follow-up meeting next week.
examples.zh: 我們可以安排下週的後續會議。

examples.en: Could you elaborate on that point?
examples.zh: 您能詳細說明那個觀點嗎？

grammar.wrong: Can you elaborate that point?
grammar.right: Could you elaborate on that point?
grammar.tip: 在正式會議中用 could 比 can 更有禮貌，也更專業。

grammar.title: 常用介系詞搭配（商務）
grammar.rule: 英文動詞+介系詞的固定搭配，必須整組記憶，不能用中文邏輯翻譯。
grammar.pattern: [動詞] + [固定介系詞]

examples.en: I am responsible for managing the project timeline.
examples.zh: 我負責管理專案時間表。（responsible for）

examples.en: We need to focus on the key deliverables this week.
examples.zh: 本週我們需要專注於關鍵交付成果。（focus on）

examples.en: This plan depends on the budget approval.
examples.zh: 這個計畫取決於預算批准。（depend on）

grammar.wrong: I am responsible of managing the project.
grammar.right: I am responsible for managing the project.
grammar.tip: responsible for / focus on / depend on / agree with / result in — 這些固定搭配要整組背。
